import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useMemo } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  FileText,
  Upload,
  Plus,
  Search,
  Filter,
  AlertCircle,
  Clock,
  RefreshCw,
  MoreVertical,
  Eye,
  Edit,
  Download,
  CheckCircle,
  AlertTriangle,

  Shield,
  Sparkles,
  FileCheck,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  FileCode,
  BookOpen,
  Star,
  Bell
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import {
  mockDocuments,
  mockUserOrganization,
  mockStaffAccessTracking,
  getDocumentsWithTracking,
  filterDocumentsBySector
} from "/src/app/data/documents.ts";
import { DocumentCreationFlow } from "/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx";
import { DocumentDetailPage } from "/src/app/components/DocumentDetailPage.tsx";
import { DocumentUploadModal } from "/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx";
export default function DocumentSuite({ role = "org-admin" }) {
  _s();
  const [view, setView] = useState("dashboard");
  const [selectedDocument, setSelectedDocument] = useState(null);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all");
  const [typeFilter, setTypeFilter] = useState("all");
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState("all");
  const [sectorFilter, setSectorFilter] = useState("all");
  const [standardFilters, setStandardFilters] = useState([]);
  const [pillarFilter, setPillarFilter] = useState("all");
  const [careTypeFilter, setCareTypeFilter] = useState("all");
  const [selectedTags, setSelectedTags] = useState([]);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [showMetadataPanel, setShowMetadataPanel] = useState(false);
  const [metadataDocument, setMetadataDocument] = useState(null);
  const aiAlerts = [
    { id: 1, type: "compliance", severity: "high", message: "3 Policies misaligned with latest legislation", count: 3 },
    { id: 2, type: "attestation", severity: "medium", message: "2 documents need re-signing", count: 2 },
    { id: 3, type: "expiry", severity: "low", message: "1 document expiring in 7 days", count: 1 }
  ];
  const baseDocuments = useMemo(() => {
    return filterDocumentsBySector(mockDocuments, mockUserOrganization.sectors);
  }, []);
  const documentsWithTracking = useMemo(() => {
    if (role === "staff") {
      return getDocumentsWithTracking(baseDocuments, mockStaffAccessTracking);
    }
    return baseDocuments;
  }, [role, baseDocuments]);
  const recentDocuments = useMemo(() => {
    if (role !== "staff") return [];
    return documentsWithTracking.filter((doc) => doc.lastAccessedAt && doc.status === "published").sort((a, b) => {
      const dateA = new Date(a.lastAccessedAt || 0).getTime();
      const dateB = new Date(b.lastAccessedAt || 0).getTime();
      return dateB - dateA;
    }).slice(0, 5);
  }, [role, documentsWithTracking]);
  const mostUsedDocuments = useMemo(() => {
    if (role !== "staff") return [];
    return documentsWithTracking.filter((doc) => doc.accessCount && doc.accessCount > 0 && doc.status === "published").sort((a, b) => (b.accessCount || 0) - (a.accessCount || 0)).slice(0, 5);
  }, [role, documentsWithTracking]);
  const mandatoryDocuments = useMemo(() => {
    if (role !== "staff") return [];
    return documentsWithTracking.filter(
      (doc) => doc.isMandatory && doc.status === "published"
    );
  }, [role, documentsWithTracking]);
  const documentsNeedingAcknowledgement = useMemo(() => {
    if (role !== "staff") return [];
    return documentsWithTracking.filter(
      (doc) => doc.requiresAcknowledgement && doc.userStatus !== "acknowledged" && doc.status === "published"
    );
  }, [role, documentsWithTracking]);
  const stats = {
    total: documentsWithTracking.length,
    draft: documentsWithTracking.filter((d) => d.status === "draft").length,
    pending: documentsWithTracking.filter((d) => d.status === "pending").length,
    published: documentsWithTracking.filter((d) => d.status === "published").length,
    expired: 0
  };
  const filteredDocuments = documentsWithTracking.filter((doc) => {
    if (role === "staff" && doc.status !== "published") {
      return false;
    }
    if (searchQuery && !doc.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) {
      return false;
    }
    if (statusFilter !== "all" && doc.status !== statusFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (typeFilter !== "all" && doc.documentType !== typeFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (categoryFilter !== "all" && doc.category !== categoryFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (sectorFilter !== "all" && !doc.sectors.includes(sectorFilter)) {
      return false;
    }
    if (standardFilters.length > 0 && !standardFilters.every((standard) => doc.standards.includes(standard))) {
      return false;
    }
    if (pillarFilter !== "all" && doc.pillar !== pillarFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (careTypeFilter !== "all" && doc.careType !== careTypeFilter) {
      return false;
    }
    if (selectedTags.length > 0 && !selectedTags.every((tag) => doc.tags.includes(tag))) {
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
  const handleAcknowledge = (docId) => {
    alert(`Document ${docId} acknowledged. This would update the backend in a real app.`);
  };
  const getDocumentIcon = (type) => {
    switch (type) {

          columnNumber: 16
        }, this);
    }
  };
  const getStatusBadge = (status) => {
    const statusConfig = {
      draft: { bg: "bg-gray-500/20", text: "text-gray-400", label: "Draft" },
      pending: { bg: "bg-yellow-500/20", text: "text-yellow-400", label: "Pending" },
      approved: { bg: "bg-blue-500/20", text: "text-blue-400", label: "Approved" },
      published: { bg: "bg-green-500/20", text: "text-green-400", label: "Published" }
    };
    const config = statusConfig[status] || statusConfig.draft;
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "span", _fgS: "cizb5", _fgB: 1779104381489, className: `px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${config.bg} ${config.text}`, "data-fg-cizb5": "418.254:618.430:/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx:201:7:7273:128:e:span:x", children: config.label }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx",
      lineNumber: 221,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this);
  };
  const getRiskBadge = (tags) => {
    const hasHighRisk = tags.some((tag) => tag.toLowerCase().includes("mandatory") || tag.toLowerCase().includes("emergency"));

      lineNumber: 233,
      columnNumber: 12

                          e.target.value = "";

_s(DocumentSuite, "8sAun5vIYYmZ4hi9/kF/CTWmzsY=");

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
